Name: iReflectionsMode
Description: Water reflections mode. Full reflections are performance heavy. Disable them if you are experiencing low frame rates. 0 - disable, 1 - sky, 2 - sky and landscape objects, 3 - full (perfomance heavy)

Name: iReflectionsMinFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iReflectionsMagFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic
